title: Build Admin Panel for Product Management

requirements.text: Add backend CRUD operations to support the admin panel: ensure addProduct, updateProduct, and deleteProduct functions exist in the main actor and are callable from the frontend. Each product must support: id, name, category, description, price, availableSizes (array of strings), stockQuantity, and imageFilename.
acceptanceCriteria: addProduct accepts all required product fields and persists a new product, returning the created product or its ID
updateProduct accepts a product ID and updated fields and persists the changes
deleteProduct accepts a product ID and removes it from the store
All three functions are exposed as public shared methods on the main actor

requirements.text: Build an Admin Panel page at the route /admin in the frontend. The page must display a full list of all existing products in a table or card list showing product name, category, price, stock, and sizes. The page must include: (1) an 'Add Product' form/modal with fields for name, category (dropdown: Female Dresses, Male Shirts, Male T-Shirts, Kids Apparel), description, price, available sizes (multi-select or comma-separated input), stock quantity, and image filename; (2) an 'Edit' action per product that pre-fills the form with existing data; (3) a 'Delete' action per product with a confirmation prompt. All mutations must call the corresponding backend functions via React Query mutations and invalidate the products query on success. Apply the existing Dhimayu Studio warm neutral theme consistently to this page.

quotes: a UI page where you can manually add, edit, and delete products through a form

acceptanceCriteria: A route /admin renders the Admin Panel page and is accessible via direct URL navigation
The page lists all products fetched from the backend with name, category, price, stock, and sizes visible
Clicking 'Add Product' opens a form/modal with all required fields; submitting calls addProduct on the backend
Clicking 'Edit' on a product pre-fills the form with that product's data; submitting calls updateProduct on the backend
Clicking 'Delete' on a product shows a confirmation prompt; confirming calls deleteProduct on the backend
After any successful mutation, the product list refreshes to reflect the change
Form validates that required fields (name, category, price, stock) are not empty before submission
The page uses the existing warm neutral colour palette and typography (Cormorant Garamond / Jost) consistent with the rest of the app

requirements.text: Add an 'Admin' link in the Header navigation (desktop and mobile menu) that navigates to /admin. It should be styled consistently with the existing category navigation links in Header.tsx.
acceptanceCriteria: A navigation link labelled 'Admin' appears in the desktop header nav and the mobile collapsible menu
The link uses the same font, colour, and hover style as the existing category navigation links

constraints: Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo (single-actor architecture)
The admin panel must not break or alter any existing routes (home, catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation)
nonGoals: Authentication or access control for the admin panel (no login gate required at this stage)
Order management in the admin panel
Image upload functionality — image filename is entered as a plain text field
